body:
Tank PvP Resource Pack

Dominate the battlefield with Tank PvP, a resource pack designed for intense PvP combat.

Features:

Clean and aggressive PvP-style textures

Bold swords, tools, and armor for better visibility

Clear UI and crosshair for faster reactions

Optimized for PvP servers and duels

Perfect for KitPvP, Lifesteal, SMP PvP, and Practice servers.
